title: Akh'laht
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Akh'laht |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Clan Kihm'bar]] *[[Noghri Death Commando]]s |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Rukh, clan Baikh'vair, we salute your sacrifice. Die with honor.''"
"''Go with luck, Akh'laht, clan Kihm'bar.|Akh'laht and Rukh|{{WEGCite|story=Setting Things Right|book=The Last Command Sourcebook|reprint=1}}}} '''Akh'laht''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] of [[Clan Kihm'bar]] and one of the [[Noghri Death Commando]]s. After the Empire's deception to the Noghri was revealed, he informed [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]], the [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], of this revelation. Rukh then promised to make the Grand Admiral pay, which he did, during the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Sources== *''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Noghri]]
